message:
refactor(model,storage): resilient status parsing, priority defaults, and query optimizations

- Return Custom() variant for unknown status strings instead of erroring
- Change default Priority from LOW to MEDIUM for better triage defaults
- Add composite index on (status, priority) for common query patterns
- Exclude tombstoned issues from dependency cycle detection queries
- Consolidate dep-related storage methods with bidirectional traversal support

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
